content: I will update `extract.js` to perform a raw text search on each line of the JSONL log for the string `dashboard.tsx` and see how it is structured, which will prevent any issues with nested JSON structures.

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","Summary":"Script to search for raw lines containing dashboard.tsx and dump their structure to find how the file was modified in past steps."}
args.Description: "Update extract.js to search for raw tool calls in log"
